diagnosis: This production run has two distinct root causes: incorrect fastener installation at the front bracket and missing components in the wheel assemblies, both leading to critical functional and safety risks.

groups.label: Incorrect fastener used on front bracket

members.reason: The installation of an acorn nut instead of the specified threaded bracket screw is an independent root cause compromising assembly integrity.
Skipping the installation of the rear pulley before the rear wheels is a root cause that can cause functional failure.
Omission of the washer behind the front wheel is a root cause that degrades product quality.
The state strip comparison detected missing rear pulley and front wheel washer, reporting the consequences of the root causes INC-2046 and INC-2047.
